scripts.dev:all: bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; pkill -f "/Users/maccy/bookyourstay/apps/backend/bin/Debug/net10.0/backend --urls http://localhost:8080" 2>/dev/null || true; pkill -f "next dev --hostname 0.0.0.0 --port 3000" 2>/dev/null || true; docker compose -f compose.yml up -d --remove-orphans postgres minio minio-init; dotnet watch --project apps/backend run --urls http://localhost:8080 & backend_pid=$!; bun run --filter frontend dev -- --hostname 0.0.0.0 --port 3000 & frontend_pid=$!; cleanup() { kill "$backend_pid" "$frontend_pid" 2>/dev/null || true; wait "$backend_pid" 2>/dev/null || true; wait "$frontend_pid" 2>/dev/null || true; }; trap cleanup EXIT INT TERM; while kill -0 "$backend_pid" 2>/dev/null && kill -0 "$frontend_pid" 2>/dev/null; do sleep 1; done; cleanup'
scripts.build: bun run build:backend && bun run build:frontend
scripts.infra:up: docker compose -f compose.yml up -d --remove-orphans postgres minio minio-init
scripts.infra:logs: docker compose -f compose.yml logs -f postgres minio
scripts.check: bun run build && bun run test:backend && bun run lint:frontend && bun run typecheck:frontend
